title: Correct SCHC receiver retry oracle
description: schc_fragmentation.json requires Receiver-Abort instead of the fifth ACK when Attempts is 4, contradicting RFC 8724 Section 8.4.3.2 and the draft prose, which send ACK, increment, then abort when exceeding MAX_ACK_REQUESTS. Establish the correct independent oracle before any language migration. Blocks conditional SCHC profile/vector slice.
